query: why are users getting 401 errors last monday morning

expected_clarification.rationale: 'last monday morning' is unambiguous — pins to last Monday 06:00-12:00.

log_line_must_contain_one_of: Public key push to verification-svc timed out

propagation_chain_must_include_in_order.what_must_mention: key rotation / k-2026-05 / push timed out

ruled_out_hypotheses_must_include.rationale: user-svc had a slow query warning at 09:15:10 that coincides with the incident window but is a read-path anomaly on a separate service with no connection to JWT verification. No auth-related errors in user-svc.
cache-svc had an eviction spike starting at 09:14 that predates and has no causal link to the 401 errors. The JWT verification path does not depend on cache-svc.

assumptions_must_echo: 'this morning' interpreted as ANCHOR_DATE 09:00–10:00 UTC (or user-local)

common_failure_modes_to_grade_against: Names api-gateway or billing-svc as root cause — these are downstream symptoms.
Includes cache-svc in affected_services based on coincidental eviction spike.
Includes user-svc in affected_services based on coincidental slow query warning.
Misses auth-svc entirely because it has no ERROR-level logs — only INFO/WARNING.
Fails to identify the push-failure WARNING in auth-svc as the mechanism linking rotation to 401s.
Returns auth-svc rotation alone as root cause without noting the failed push is the critical gap.
Skips ruled_out_hypotheses or doesn't address cache-svc and user-svc specifically.
Hallucinates chunk_ids that weren't in the evidence pool.
what_this_dataset_tests: Heavy noise filtering: >70% of log lines are routine health checks, metrics, and unrelated operations.
INFO-level trigger: the root cause event (key rotation + push failure) is WARNING/INFO, not ERROR.
Red herring elimination: cache-svc eviction spike and user-svc slow query both coincide temporally but are causally unrelated.
Push-failure attribution: identifying the WARNING about failed push as the mechanism connecting rotation to downstream 401s.
Temporal grounding: 'this morning' must resolve to last Monday morning.
